title: VPC Peering vs. Transit Gateway
description: Evaluate the differences and appropriate use cases for VPC Peering versus Transit Gateway. Choose the optimal interconnection strategy for multi-VPC architectures based on complexity, cost, and routing needs.
objectives: Evaluate the differences and appropriate use cases for VPC Peering versus Transit Gateway.
Choose the optimal interconnection strategy for multi-VPC architectures based on complexity, cost, and routing needs.
